heading: Alternative forms of annuities
label: 8420a Alternative forms of annuities

children.label: a
children.text: The Office shall prescribe regulations under which any employee or Member who has a life-threatening affliction or other critical medical condition may, at the time of retiring under this subchapter, elect annuity benefits under this section instead of any other benefits under this subchapter, and any benefits under subchapter IV of this chapter, based on the service of the employee or Member.

children.label: A
children.text: payment of the lump-sum credit (excluding interest) to the employee or Member; and

children.label: B
children.text: payment of an annuity to the employee or Member for life; and

children.label: A
children.text: payment of the lump-sum credit (excluding interest) to the employee or Member; and

children.label: B
children.text: payment of an annuity to the employee or Member for life, with a survivor annuity payable for the life of a surviving spouse.
the present value of the annuity which would otherwise be provided under this subchapter, as computed under section 8415; and
the present value of the annuity supplement which would otherwise be provided (if any) under section 8421.
is married, shall be ineligible to make an election under this section unless a waiver is made under section 8416(a); or

has a former spouse, shall be ineligible to make an election under this section if the former spouse is entitled to benefits under section 8445 or 8467 (based on the service of the employee or Member) under the terms of a decree of divorce or annulment, or a court order or court-approved property settlement incident to any such decree, with respect to which the Office has been duly notified.

children.label: e
children.text: An employee or Member who is married at the time of retiring under this subchapter and who makes an election under this section may, during the 18-month period beginning on the date of retirement, make the election provided for under section 8416(d), subject to the deposit requirement thereunder.
